content: Hello, Mr. Rishi. It's Sunday, April 26, 2026. Is there anything specific you'd like to work on or discuss today?
remember on 4th of june mera birthday hai
Noted, Mr. Rishi. Your birthday is on June 4th, about 40 days from now - would you like me to prepare a reminder or plan something for the occasion?
I've made a note to prepare a birthday plan for June 4th. Would you like me to send you a reminder a week before, or perhaps suggest some gift ideas or celebration plans, Mr. Rishi?
then on 28 april ko mera ek important meeting hai yaad rakhna
Noted, Mr. Rishi. You have an important meeting on April 28th - I'll remind you about it tomorrow, April 27th, to ensure you're prepared.
